title: Dr Lal PathLabs is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Dr Lal PathLabs is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Dr Lal PathLabs in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dr Lal PathLabs:
Dr Lal PathLabs is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
